Trial-to-hire rate

Flexible Engagement Models

Whether you need an extra set of hands, a full squad, or an emergency rescue—we have a model for your exact stage.

Managed AI Engineer

Seamlessly integrate top 1% AI engineers into your existing team. Scale up or down as needed.

  • Pre-vetted AI specialists
  • Matches your timezone & stack
  • 2-week risk-free trial

Outcome Based AI-Projects

Have an idea? We'll scope, build, and ship your AI product from scratch with a dedicated squad.

  • End-to-end development
  • Fixed scope & timeline
  • Dedicated Project Manager

AI Reliability & App Rescue

Stuck with a failing agency, hallucinating RAG, or a half-finished "Vibe Coded" app? Our SWAT team will audit, fix, and maintain it.

  • Deep codebase & architecture audit
  • Fix hallucinations & performance
  • Ongoing maintenance & optimization

From Guesswork to Deployed in 14 Days

Don't waste months waiting for the right hire. We use millions of data points and human expertise to find the perfect fit in days.

Available Now, Satisfaction Guaranteed

Most matches are made within 48 hours. If you approve, they start within a week. Try them for two weeks, keep going, or replace them no questions asked.

Case Studies

Real Results. Real AI Deployments.

1 / 4
Mortgage / FinTechV1 build sprint

AI-Powered Loan Package Verification Replaces Manual PDF Sorting and Spreadsheet Checklists

Lenders selling loans on the secondary mortgage market were drowning in manual PDF sorting, spreadsheet-based checklists, and email-driven exception tracking. Kovil AI built the mortgage document platform — a two-phase AI platform that classifies loan documents automatically and verifies complete packages against takeout partner requirements.

2-Phase
AI Platform Delivered
Auto
Document Classification
Read Case Study
FinTech / LendingTechOngoing engagement

End-to-End AI Automation Transforms Deal Processing for a Digital Lending Platform

A rapidly growing digital lending platform was held back by manual underwriting workflows, fragile API integrations, and slow deal processing cycles. Kovil AI embedded an AI-first engineering team that redesigned automation end-to-end — delivering faster deal turnaround, reduced manual effort, and a scalable automation foundation.

Faster
Deal Processing Turnaround
Reduced
Manual Underwriting Effort
Read Case Study
FinTech18 days

A PCI-Compliant Payment Dashboard Launched 40% Under Budget

A Series A FinTech startup needed a production-ready payment dashboard in 3 weeks. Kovil AI delivered in 18 days — PCI-compliant, fully tested, and 40% under the original budget.

18
Days to Launch
40%
Under Budget
